name: App Market
description: Browse and install OpenClaw plugins from GitHub with one click.

registryUrl.label: Registry URL
registryUrl.help: URL to the plugin registry. Defaults to the official Soulz registry on jsDelivr CDN.

cacheTtlMs.label: Cache TTL (ms)
cacheTtlMs.help: How long to cache registry and GitHub data before re-fetching.
